text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno Dictus receives a commendation from the
student council for identifying the person who
made a mess of the flowerbed.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So, I hear you used cleat tracks to solve the
flowerbed incident.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I didn't do it alone. The case would still be a
mystery if not for Bamboo and Helios's
cooperation.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Still, using the culpr—ah, Bamboo's—footprints to
figure out what happened is quite a feat.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
One might even say it was a stroke of genius.
Surely your knowledge of cleats is second to
none.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Not at all. I simply have a great deal of respect
for cleat-fitters and some rudimentary knowledge
of their craft, having studied it in my own time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Respect, you say? Indeed, the master cleat-fitter
can discern a runner's growth and bad habits from
their cleats alone.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes... That's exactly right. You seem very
well-informed yourself.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...Are you by any chance acquainted with a
cleat-fitter?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes. A certain someone has taken good care of
me for many years. I always get them to make my
cleats.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I thought as much! In fact, I've thought so for
some time!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Is that right?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Your speed, your center of gravity, your form...
They're all flawless in every respect!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
But no ordinary cleats would be able to endure
such exemplary running. You would need cleats of
the same caliber!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's it! I knew you had custom cleats!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: H-hey...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and Air Groove! Pardon my impertinence, but
I wonder if you wouldn't benefit from switching to
heavier cleats...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'm positive it would improve your performance
on corners!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: And as for you hiding under the desk there! Teio!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I think you could truly realize your potential with
lighter cleats. It would relieve some of the burden
on you while you run!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Ooh, I see... Wait, how did you know I was here?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Well, it's certainly clear that you've got a deep
passion for cleats. One might even say too deep.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Essentially, I forgot myself for a moment and
started rambling about cleats...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, it happens. Don't worry about it too much.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
But I've always struggled with this. Honestly, this
lack of self-control worries me sometimes...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh boy, you're really beating yourself up about
this, huh?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nice timing. Did you hear all that? Can you
offer a few words of encouragement?
choice_data_list:
Are you confident that what you said was
accurate?
Can you pick out some cleats for me too?
Can you pick out some cleats for me too?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nice timing. Did you hear all that? Can you
offer a few words of encouragement?
choice_data_list:
Are you confident that what you said was
accurate?
Can you pick out some cleats for me too?
Can you pick out some cleats for me too?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Of course I am. If I wasn't confident, I wouldn't
have said any of it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So, what's the trouble? You came out with all that
'cause you want what's best for the student
council, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
This'd be a whole nother story if the student
council didn't want to hear it, but did any of them
look like they wanted you to pipe down?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Not particularly, but...
choice_data_list: Then there's nothing to worry about.
Then there's nothing to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: I... suppose. All right, I'll take your word for it.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Oh, in that case!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
If it's not a bother, then I really ought to
recommend them all a cleat specialist I know!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look at what you've unleashed... You sure
that was the best advice?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But humans don't wear cleats...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Hm. Cleats for humans? Now that you mention
it... I've never given it much thought.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
With the differences in skeletal structure and
muscle mass... No, it'd be better to start by
considering the merits of fitting a human with
cleats in the first place...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh, Ikuno? I think maybe you've gone and
slipped into cleat mode again.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, I need something to work off of.
Trainer, would you mind running for me? That'll
help us establish the best approach!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hoo boy, I sure didn't see this coming...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Still, this is for Ikuno's benefit, so I'm gonna help out. You should too! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hearing that, I don't think refusing is an option.
And so, I find myself roped into Ikuno Dictus's
human cleat research.
